summary: Added shared AgentOps TypeScript contracts, serialization and validation helpers, demo fixtures, and contract lifecycle documentation without changing existing UI imports or backend behavior.
risks: Architecture contracts remain handoff/view contracts until backed by existing Aletheia persistence through adapter-owned mappings.
needs: Future persistence work should map these snake_case handoff contracts to existing backend repository records without creating a second product source of truth.
last_cycle_summary: Added shared AgentOps TypeScript contracts, serialization and validation helpers, demo fixtures, and contract lifecycle documentation without changing existing UI imports or backend behavior.
next_actions: Feature agents can import from frontend/src/aletheia/agentops for typed artifact handoff.
